description:
Simple grocery, to-do, and packing lists. No ads, no tracking.
Groce is a straightforward list app for everyday life. It covers grocery shopping, to-do tasks, and packing for trips — all in one place, without any distractions.

Free. Open source. No ads. No analytics. No tracking of any kind. No account required.

GROCERY LIST
Keep a catalogue of items organised by aisle. The "Needed" view shows only what you are currently out of. Mark items as weekly recurring to keep them on the list automatically.

TO-DO LISTS
Create as many named to-do lists as you need, organised by category. Tasks can be marked as recurring so they reappear each time you reset the list.

PACKING LIST
Pack for a trip without forgetting anything. Items are grouped by category. Recurring items (passport, charger, and so on) can be set once and reused for every trip.

PRIVACY
All data is stored in plain CSV files on your device. The app has no network access except for optional Google Drive backup. Nothing is sent to any server.

BACKUP
Connect to Google Drive to keep automatic backups of your lists. You can also export and import CSV files manually from the Settings screen.
